rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports, and in implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings.
Use annex agree blocks to contain AGREE contract elements, with type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE expressions use only visible identifiers and avoid AADL property names as variables.
Write range guarantees using named constants or visible feature names when concrete bounds are provided.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, `const`, and `assign` syntax within AGREE annexes.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference AADL timing properties directly as AGREE variables.
